characters.appearance: Young man, early 20s, brown complexion, curly dark brown hair, expressive eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: Changes throughout: light patterned short-sleeve shirt, blue overshirt, dark suit jacket, and a casual grey t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from highly anxious and sweating to confident, happy, and relaxed.

characters.appearance: Small, floating holographic robot. Rounded head, large glowing blue eyes, no visible mouth.
characters.wardrobe: None, appears as a glowing blue digital projection.

characters.appearance: Young woman, early 20s, fair complexion, long straight black hair.
Older man, grey hair, fair complexion. Wears dark rectangular glasses. Only seen in profile or from behind.
characters.wardrobe: Dark suit jacket, white collared shirt.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: English बोलने में डर लगता है? लगता है कि कहीं कुछ गलत ना बोल दूँ? [Are you afraid to speak English? Do you feel like you might say something wrong?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear of speaking English.
- Establishes empathy with the learner's anxiety and hesitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English बोलने में डर लगता है? गलत बोलने की चिंता सताती है? [Are you afraid to speak English? Worried about speaking incorrectly?]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: टेंशन मत लो, Supernova App है ना! [Don't worry, Supernova App is here, right!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the supportive solution.
- Shifts the tone from anxious to hopeful and practical.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आ गया है Supernova App! [The Supernova App is here!]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: यहाँ आप हमारे AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हो। वो भी बिना किसी झिझक के! [Here you can practice speaking English daily with our AI Tutor. That too without any hesitation!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the core AI Tutor feature.
- Emphasizes a safe, judgment-free environment for daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: AI Tutor के साथ बिना झिझक रोज़ Practice करें। [Practice daily with the AI Tutor without hesitation.]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Interview हो या दोस्तों से बात करनी हो, Supernova आपको हर real-world situation के लिए तैयार करता है। [Whether it's an interview or talking to friends, Supernova prepares you for every real-world situation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects app features to real-world speaking scenarios.
- Shows the practical benefit of the app in everyday life.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Interview हो या दोस्तों से बात, हर situation के लिए तैयार बनें! [Whether it's an interview or talking to friends, get ready for every situation!]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसके daily lessons से आपकी English दिन-ब-दिन और बेहतर होती जाएगी। [With its daily lessons, your English will keep getting better day by day.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Focuses on the daily learning habit.
- Builds confidence in gradual, structured improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Daily Lessons से अपनी English को लगातार बेहतर बनाएं। [Continuously improve your English with Daily Lessons.]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो इंतज़ार कैसा? आज ही अपना affordable trial शुरू करो। [So why wait? Start your affordable trial today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the successful payoff of acing a professional interaction.
- Provides a low-friction call to action without specific pricing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही अपना affordable trial शुरू करें! [Start your affordable trial today!]

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Confidence के साथ English बोलो। Supernova App आज ही download करो! [Speak English with confidence. Download the Supernova App today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Final encouraging push from a relatable peer.
- Clear call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Confidence के साथ English बोलें। आज ही Download करें! [Speak English with confidence. Download today!]
